description: Create a mechanical supply duct layout plan for an office space in LibreCAD using inches as the drawing unit. The layout must include a 360" wide x 240" high room rectangle starting at (0,0) on layer 'WALLS' (Color: Black/White). On layer 'DUCT-SUPPLY' (Color: Cyan), draw a horizontal main trunk 24" high (Y=108 to Y=132) running from X=30 to X=330, along with four 10" wide vertical branches: Branch 1 (X=115 to X=125, Y=132 to Y=192), Branch 2 (X=235 to X=245, Y=132 to Y=192), Branch 3 (X=115 to X=125, Y=108 to Y=48), and Branch 4 (X=235 to X=245, Y=108 to Y=48). On layer 'DUCT-DIFFUSER' (Color: Red), draw a 24"x24" square diffuser with an 'X' inside centered at the end of each of the four branches. On layer 'DUCT-RETURN' (Color: Magenta), draw a 24"x24" return grille box at (288, 108) containing three horizontal lines. On layer 'DUCT-LABELS' (Color: Green), add text '24x12' near the main trunk and '10x8' near one of the branches using a text height of approximately 6. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/hvac_duct_layout.dxf.
